name: logicpilot
description: Front-end-first LogicPilot workflow: RTL/SV design and modeling, source/TB audit, synthesizable coding, lint, simulation, verification, synthesis, power analysis, constraints, CDC, interfaces, and optional FPGA/ASIC back-end.

interface.shortDescription: Tool-agnostic RTL/HDL front-end workflow and knowledge skills
interface.longDescription: Skills covering design discipline, planning, RTL design, SystemVerilog design/modeling, source and testbench audits, synthesizable coding, reset/RDC, FSM, CDC, constraints, interfaces, simulation, SystemVerilog verification platforms, assertions/coverage/formal, synthesis, power analysis, FPGA architecture optimization/timing closure, gate-level verification, and ASIC implementation, plus a toolchain-agnostic flow driver.
